channel.title: Hadolint on Xianpeng Shen

item.title: A Three-Year Community Pain Point—I Put Hadolint on PyPI, Ending Manual Installation
item.author: xianpeng.shen@gmail.com (Xianpeng Shen)
item.description: Hadolint’s pre-commit integration has long lacked an automatic installation solution, a problem that has plagued the community for three years. This article explains how, by packaging the Hadolint binary into a Python Wheel and publishing it to PyPI, pre-commit can integrate Hadolint with a single command, just like any Python tool, completely eliminating the burden of manual downloads and environment configuration.
